title: Farming Profitability Review 2025: an independent review
body: "Baroness Batters’ review provides a comprehensive assessment of the issues underpinning farm business profitability and sets out recommendations spanning the short, medium and long term.  Together, these recommendations offer a coherent framework for how government and industry can work in partnership to deliver a more profitable, sustainable farming system.  The report puts forward 57 recommendations, to specifically provide input to the:   Food Strategy Farming Roadmap Land Use Framework   This is alongside wider government missions and priorities, including economic growth.  "
